mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT '총 반출건' as "gbn"
, COALESCE(SUM(1), 0) AS "all" , COALESCE(SUM(case dd when '01' then 1 else 0 end), 0) as "one" , COALESCE(SUM(case dd when '02' then 1 else 0 end), 0) as "two" , COALESCE(SUM(case dd when '03' then 1 else 0 end), 0) as "three" , COALESCE(SUM(case dd when '04' then 1 else 0 end), 0) as "four" , COALESCE(SUM(case dd when '05' then 1 else 0 end), 0) as "five" , COALESCE(SUM(case dd when '06' then 1 else 0 end), 0) as "six" , COALESCE(SUM(case dd when '07' then 1 else 0 end), 0) as "seven" , COALESCE(SUM(case dd when '08' then 1 else 0 end), 0) as "eight" , COALESCE(SUM(case dd when '09' then 1 else 0 end), 0) as "nine" , COALESCE(SUM(case dd when '10' then 1 else 0 end), 0) as "ten" , COALESCE(SUM(case dd when '11' then 1 else 0 end), 0) as "eleven" , COALESCE(SUM(case dd when '12' then 1 else 0 end), 0) as "twelve" , COALESCE(SUM(case dd when '13' then 1 else 0 end), 0) as "thirteen" , COALESCE(SUM(case dd when '14' then 1 else 0 end), 0) as "fourteen" , COALESCE(SUM(case dd when '15' then 1 else 0 end), 0) as "fifteen" , COALESCE(SUM(case dd when '16' then 1 else 0 end), 0) as "sixteen" , COALESCE(SUM(case dd when '17' then 1 else 0 end), 0) as "seventeen" , COALESCE(SUM(case dd when '18' then 1 else 0 end), 0) as "eighteen" , COALESCE(SUM(case dd when '19' then 1 else 0 end), 0) as "nineteen" , COALESCE(SUM(case dd when '20' then 1 else 0 end), 0) as "twenty" , COALESCE(SUM(case dd when '21' then 1 else 0 end), 0) as "twentyOne" , COALESCE(SUM(case dd when '22' then 1 else 0 end), 0) as "twentyTwo" , COALESCE(SUM(case dd when '23' then 1 else 0 end), 0) as "twentyThree" , COALESCE(SUM(case dd when '24' then 1 else 0 end), 0) as "twentyFour" , COALESCE(SUM(case dd when '25' then 1 else 0 end), 0) as "twentyFive" , COALESCE(SUM(case dd when '26' then 1 else 0 end), 0) as "twentySix" , COALESCE(SUM(case dd when '27' then 1 else 0 end), 0) as "twentySeven" , COALESCE(SUM(case dd when '28' then 1 else 0 end), 0) as "twentyEight" , COALESCE(SUM(case dd when '29' then 1 else 0 end), 0) as "twentyNine" , COALESCE(SUM(case dd when '30' then 1 else 0 end), 0) as "thirty" , COALESCE(SUM(case dd when '31' then 1 else 0 end), 0) as "thirtyOne"
FROM( SELECT cctv.cctv_nm , substring(reqst_dat, 1, 4) AS yy , substring(reqst_dat, 5, 2) AS mm , substring(reqst_dat, 7, 2) AS dd FROM xeus.crms_trans_rqst as rqst, xeus.asset_cctv as cctv, xeus.crms_trans_avi as avi
req_gbn_cd <> '15'
AND rqst.req_gbn_cd = #{reqGbnCd}
AND rqst.reqst_dat LIKE #{year}||'%'
AND rqst.reqst_dat LIKE '____'||#{month}||'%'
AND cctv.mgr_no = avi.cctv_mgr_no AND avi.rqst_mgr_seq = rqst.mgr_seq
) AS r
UNION ALL
SELECT cctv.cctv_nm as "gbn"
,COALESCE(SUM(1), 0) AS "all" , COALESCE(SUM(case dd when '01' then 1 else 0 end), 0) as "one" , COALESCE(SUM(case dd when '02' then 1 else 0 end), 0) as "two" , COALESCE(SUM(case dd when '03' then 1 else 0 end), 0) as "three" , COALESCE(SUM(case dd when '04' then 1 else 0 end), 0) as "four" , COALESCE(SUM(case dd when '05' then 1 else 0 end), 0) as "five" , COALESCE(SUM(case dd when '06' then 1 else 0 end), 0) as "six" , COALESCE(SUM(case dd when '07' then 1 else 0 end), 0) as "seven" , COALESCE(SUM(case dd when '08' then 1 else 0 end), 0) as "eight" , COALESCE(SUM(case dd when '09' then 1 else 0 end), 0) as "nine" , COALESCE(SUM(case dd when '10' then 1 else 0 end), 0) as "ten" , COALESCE(SUM(case dd when '11' then 1 else 0 end), 0) as "eleven" , COALESCE(SUM(case dd when '12' then 1 else 0 end), 0) as "twelve" , COALESCE(SUM(case dd when '13' then 1 else 0 end), 0) as "thirteen" , COALESCE(SUM(case dd when '14' then 1 else 0 end), 0) as "fourteen" , COALESCE(SUM(case dd when '15' then 1 else 0 end), 0) as "fifteen" , COALESCE(SUM(case dd when '16' then 1 else 0 end), 0) as "sixteen" , COALESCE(SUM(case dd when '17' then 1 else 0 end), 0) as "seventeen" , COALESCE(SUM(case dd when '18' then 1 else 0 end), 0) as "eighteen" , COALESCE(SUM(case dd when '19' then 1 else 0 end), 0) as "nineteen" , COALESCE(SUM(case dd when '20' then 1 else 0 end), 0) as "twenty" , COALESCE(SUM(case dd when '21' then 1 else 0 end), 0) as "twentyOne" , COALESCE(SUM(case dd when '22' then 1 else 0 end), 0) as "twentyTwo" , COALESCE(SUM(case dd when '23' then 1 else 0 end), 0) as "twentyThree" , COALESCE(SUM(case dd when '24' then 1 else 0 end), 0) as "twentyFour" , COALESCE(SUM(case dd when '25' then 1 else 0 end), 0) as "twentyFive" , COALESCE(SUM(case dd when '26' then 1 else 0 end), 0) as "twentySix" , COALESCE(SUM(case dd when '27' then 1 else 0 end), 0) as "twentySeven" , COALESCE(SUM(case dd when '28' then 1 else 0 end), 0) as "twentyEight" , COALESCE(SUM(case dd when '29' then 1 else 0 end), 0) as "twentyNine" , COALESCE(SUM(case dd when '30' then 1 else 0 end), 0) as "thirty" , COALESCE(SUM(case dd when '31' then 1 else 0 end), 0) as "thirtyOne"
FROM( SELECT cctv.cctv_nm , substring(rqst.reqst_dat, 1, 4) AS yy , substring(rqst.reqst_dat, 5, 2) AS mm , substring(rqst.reqst_dat, 7, 2) AS dd FROM xeus.crms_trans_rqst as rqst, xeus.asset_cctv as cctv, xeus.crms_trans_avi as avi
req_gbn_cd <> '15'
AND rqst.req_gbn_cd = #{reqGbnCd}
AND rqst.reqst_dat LIKE #{year}||'%'
AND rqst.reqst_dat LIKE '____'||#{month}||'%'
AND cctv.mgr_no = avi.cctv_mgr_no AND avi.rqst_mgr_seq = rqst.mgr_seq
) AS cctv
GROUP BY "gbn" ) AS A
ORDER BY (CASE WHEN "gbn" = '총 반출건' THEN 1 ELSE 2 END), "gbn" DESC;
